summary: Security Audit CVE Monitoring feature testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend tabs verified via Playwright with full interactive functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints correctly implement async/await with MongoDB
Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements - good testability
Monitor config persists correctly to MongoDB via config_col collection
Audit history shows both Manual and Auto scan types with correct timestamps
Severity filter buttons work correctly on Vulns tab
Trend chart renders correctly with Score and Vulns lines
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - system generates real scan data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Audit CVE Monitor at /security-audit is fully functional. System currently shows 0 vulnerabilities (Grade A, Score 100). 11+ audit history records exist. Monitor can be enabled/disabled, intervals changed (1h to 1w), severity filters toggled. Scan Now button triggers manual scans. Run Audit button in header works.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - yarn audit for frontend, pip-audit for backend

backend_tests.GET /api/security/health: PASS - status: healthy, service: Security Audit Monitor
backend_tests.GET /api/security/audit: PASS - Returns score 100, grade A, 0 vulnerabilities, 2191 dependencies
backend_tests.GET /api/security/audit?force=true: PASS - Force fresh scan, bypasses cache
backend_tests.GET /api/security/audit/frontend: PASS - Returns frontend vulnerabilities and summary
backend_tests.GET /api/security/audit/backend: PASS - Returns backend vulnerabilities and summary
backend_tests.GET /api/security/monitor/config: PASS - Returns monitor config with enabled, interval_hours, alert flags
backend_tests.POST /api/security/monitor/scan-now: PASS - Triggers manual scan, returns scan results and config
backend_tests.GET /api/security/alerts: PASS - Returns alerts list (empty when no vulns)
backend_tests.GET /api/security/alerts/count: PASS - Returns unread and total counts

Overview Tab.severity_breakdown: PASS - Shows Critical, High, Moderate, Low bars (all 0)
Overview Tab.trend_chart: PASS - Shows Security Score Trend with Score and Vulns lines

Vulns Tab.severity_filters: PASS - All, Critical, High, Moderate, Low filter buttons visible
Vulns Tab.no_vulns_message: PASS - Shows 'No vulnerabilities found' when 0 vulns

Monitoring Tab.alert_severity_toggles: PASS - Critical, High, Moderate, Low toggles work
Monitoring Tab.scan_stats: PASS - Total Scans, Last Scan, Next Scan displayed correctly

History Tab.history_table: PASS - Shows audit history with columns: Timestamp, Grade, Score, Vulns, Breakdown, Type

Navigation.nav_link: PASS - Security nav link visible with data-testid='nav-security-audit-link'
